Cluster_1.name: Cluster 1: Health
Cluster_1.summary: Improves and protects citizens’ health and wellbeing through prevention, diagnostics, treatments, and resilient health systems, including digital health and preparedness.

Cluster_2.name: Cluster 2: Culture, Creativity and Inclusive Society
Cluster_2.summary: Strengthens democratic governance and social resilience, supports cultural heritage and creative sectors, and advances inclusion, equality, and citizens’ participation.

Cluster_3.name: Cluster 3: Civil Security for Society
Cluster_3.summary: Enhances security and resilience against threats and crises, including cybersecurity, disaster risk management, border security, and protection of critical infrastructure.

Cluster_4.name: Cluster 4: Digital, Industry and Space
Cluster_4.summary: Advances digital and enabling technologies, industrial innovation and competitiveness, and space capabilities, including AI, data, advanced materials, and manufacturing.

Cluster_5.name: Cluster 5: Climate, Energy and Mobility
Cluster_5.summary: Accelerates climate action and decarbonisation via clean energy, sustainable mobility, resilient transport systems, and climate adaptation solutions.

Cluster_6.name: Cluster 6: Food, Bioeconomy, Natural Resources, Agriculture and Environment
Cluster_6.summary: Enables sustainable food systems and bioeconomy, protects biodiversity and ecosystems, and supports climate-smart agriculture, forestry, oceans, and circular bio-based value chains.
